name: ownership-rule-and-seed-noise
ground_truth_note: lib/db/provider-exercise-catalog at 96e3553. Real seeds contain (a) table:exercise_source_normalizations writers=2 (derivation-upsert.ts + entities.ts) — under the CRUD rule this MUST yield owner: NONE, and (b) a metrics parser artifact 'table:arrayBuffer' — a fake table the mapper must NOT promote to an entity (no type/contract basis).
